message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[{\"customer_id\": \"A1\", \"amount\": 100.0, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1700000000, \"linked_accounts\": [\"B2\"]}, {\"customer_id\": \"B2\", \"amount\": 110.0, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1700000050, \"linked_accounts\": [\"C3\"]}, {\"customer_id\": \"C3\", \"amount\": 120.0, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1700000100, \"linked_accounts\": [\"A1\"]}, {\"customer_id\": \"D4\", \"amount\": 50.0, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1700000200, \"linked_accounts\": [\"E5\"]}, {\"customer_id\": \"E5\", \"amount\": 55.0, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1700000250, \"linked_accounts\": [\"D4\"]}]","{\"A1\": [{\"amount\": 90, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1690000000, \"linked_accounts\": []}, {\"amount\": 95, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1690003600, \"linked_accounts\": []}], \"B2\": [{\"amount\": 100, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1690007200, \"linked_accounts\": []}], \"C3\": [{\"amount\": 80, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1690010800, \"linked_accounts\": []}, {\"amount\": 85, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1690014400, \"linked_accounts\": []}], \"D4\": [{\"amount\": 40, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1690018000, \"linked_accounts\": []}], \"E5\": [{\"amount\": 45, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1690021600, \"linked_accounts\": []} }"], "focus":"Cycle detection (3-cycle and 2-cycle) with DSU pruning; ensure cycles <=3 hops are flagged and unrelated components ignored."},{"input_lines":["[{\"customer_id\": \"Z1\", \"amount\": 150, \"location\": \"DE\", \"timestamp\": 1701000000, \"linked_accounts\": [\"Y2\"]}, {\"customer_id\": \"M2\", \"amount\": 10, \"location\": \"DE\", \"timestamp\": 1701000300, \"linked_accounts\": [\"N3\"]}]","{\"Z1\": [{\"amount\": 100, \"location\": \"DE\", \"timestamp\": 1691000000, \"linked_accounts\": []}, {\"amount\": 100, \"location\": \"DE\", \"timestamp\": 1691003600, \"linked_accounts\": []}, {\"amount\": 100, \"location\": \"DE\", \"timestamp\": 1691007200, \"linked_accounts\": []}], \"M2\": [] }"], "focus":"Zero MAD historical case (identical past amounts) to trigger amount-outlier logic; also a customer with empty history to ensure amount checks are skipped."},{"input_lines":["[{\"customer_id\": \"H1\", \"amount\": 5, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1702000000, \"linked_accounts\": [\"K1\"]}, {\"customer_id\": \"H1\", \"amount\": 6, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1702000100, \"linked_accounts\": [\"K2\"]}, {\"customer_id\": \"H1\", \"amount\": 7, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1702000200, \"linked_accounts\": [\"K3\"]}, {\"customer_id\": \"H1\", \"amount\": 8, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1702000300, \"linked_accounts\": [\"K4\"]}, {\"customer_id\": \"H1\", \"amount\": 9, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1702000400, \"linked_accounts\": [\"K5\"]}, {\"customer_id\": \"H1\", \"amount\": 10, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1702000500, \"linked_accounts\": [\"K6\"]}, {\"customer_id\": \"O2\", \"amount\": 200, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1702000600, \"linked_accounts\": [\"P3\"]}]","{\"H1\": [{\"amount\": 4, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1699000000, \"linked_accounts\": []}, {\"amount\": 5, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1699003600, \"linked_accounts\": []}], \"O2\": [{\"amount\": 190, \"location\": \"US\", \"timestamp\": 1699050000, \"linked_accounts\": []}], \"K1\": [], \"K2\": [], \"K3\": [], \"K4\": [], \"K5\": [], \"K6\": [], \"P3\": [] }"], "focus":"High-frequency burst: many transactions from same sender within one hour vs small 7-day historical rate; should flag the burst while leaving unrelated customers alone."}]}
